'''pasushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nocktat|nocktat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nocktat|nocktat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pasushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæsishith|pæsishith]] || [[word:pæsishij|pæsishij]] || [[word:pæsishish|pæsishish]] || [[word:pæsishi|pæsishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pasusushuth|pasusushuth]] || [[word:pasusushuj|pasusushuj]] || [[word:pasusushush|pasusushush]] || [[word:pasusushu|pasusushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pasushuth|pasushuth]] || [[word:pasushuj|pasushuj]] || [[word:pasushush|pasushush]] || [[word:pasushu|pasushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pasufshuth|pasufshuth]] || [[word:pasufshuj|pasufshuj]] || [[word:pasufshush|pasufshush]] || [[word:pasufshuf|pasufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pasushuthu|pasushuthu]] || [[word:pasushuju|pasushuju]] || [[word:pasushushu|pasushushu]] || [[word:pasushuku|pasushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pasushuth|pasushuth]] || [[word:pasushuj|pasushuj]] || [[word:pasushush|pasushush]] || [[word:pasushu|pasushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pasushuthul|pasushuthul]] || [[word:pasushujul|pasushujul]] || [[word:pasushushul|pasushushul]] || [[word:pasushukul|pasushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pasushuthuthu|pasushuthuthu]] || [[word:pasushujuju|pasushujuju]] || [[word:pasushushushu|pasushushushu]] || [[word:pasushuku|pasushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pasushuthun|pasushuthun]] || [[word:pasushujun|pasushujun]] || [[word:pasushushun|pasushushun]] || [[word:pasushukun|pasushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pasushuthuoro|pasushuthuoro]] || [[word:pasushujuoro|pasushujuoro]] || [[word:pasushushuoro|pasushushuoro]] || [[word:pasushukuoro|pasushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
